result.stdout:
FindReplaceUtility 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 -

  -l, --list                    (Default: false) list target file. no execute.

  -n, --no-result-is-success    (Default: false) no replace result is success.

  -i, --include                 (Default: .*) A regular expression of files to
                                include in our find and replace

  -e, --exclude                 (Default: [.]git) A regular expression of files
                                to exclude in our find and replace

  -f, --find                    Required. The string we want to replace

  -r, --replace                 Required. The new string to replace with

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

  value pos. 0                  (Default: .) Current direcotry.
